title: Reviewer Agent: Separate Builder from Marker

questions.question: Why cannot the builder reliably grade its own work?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 builder 不能可靠地给自己的工作打分？
options: Acceptance is necessary but not sufficient; problem-fit, scope discipline, documented assumptions, and handoff readiness need a different role with different inputs
options_zh: 通过验收是必要但不充分；问题契合度、范围纪律、有文档的假设、交接就绪度，需要由另一个角色用不同的输入来评估
questions.explanation: The gap between builder and reviewer is where reliability lives; acceptance only proves a weaker version.
questions.explanation_zh: Builder 和 reviewer 之间的缺口才是可靠性的栖身之处；仅仅通过验收只证明了一个较弱的版本。

questions.question: Which is NOT one of the five rubric dimensions?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪个不是五个 rubric 维度之一？
questions.explanation: The five are problem fit, scope discipline, assumptions, verification quality, handoff readiness.
questions.explanation_zh: 五个维度是：问题契合度、范围纪律、假设、验证质量、交接就绪度。

questions.question: What does role separation require?
options: A different system prompt and different inputs; the same model can play both roles if posture changes and the reviewer has no write access to the diff
options_zh: 不同的 system prompt 和不同的输入；只要姿态切换、且 reviewer 对 diff 没有写权限，同一个模型可以分饰两角
questions.explanation: Discipline is in posture and inputs, not in the model identity.
questions.explanation_zh: 纪律来自姿态和输入，而不是模型身份。

questions.question: What does Cloudflare's 2026 review architecture look like?
questions.question_zh: Cloudflare 2026 年的评审架构长什么样？
options: Up to seven specialist reviewers in parallel under a Review Coordinator that deduplicates findings; top-tier model only for the coordinator, cheaper tiers for specialists
options_zh: 在 Review Coordinator 之下并行运行最多七个专家 reviewer，由 Coordinator 去重；只有 Coordinator 用顶级模型，专家用更便宜的层级
questions.explanation: Cloudflare ran 131,246 review runs in 30 days using specialist + coordinator architecture.
questions.explanation_zh: Cloudflare 用「专家 + 协调者」架构在 30 天内跑了 131,246 次评审。

questions.question: Which of these is NOT one of the four LLM-judge biases the lesson lists?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一项不是课程列出的四种 LLM 评审偏差之一？
options: Position bias (A,B vs B,A ordering inconsistency)
options_zh: 位置偏差（A,B 与 B,A 顺序不一致）
啰嗦偏差（输出越长分越高）
questions.explanation: The four are position, verbosity, self-preference, authority; vector locality is not one of them.
questions.explanation_zh: 四种偏差是：位置、啰嗦、自我偏好、权威；向量局部性不在其中。

questions.question: What is a calibration set?
options: 10-20 historical task close-outs with known correct verdicts; rerun on every prompt change; if reviewer agreement falls below 80%, fix the rubric before shipping
options_zh: 10–20 个已知正确判定的历史任务收尾样本；每次修改 prompt 都重跑；如果 reviewer 一致率低于 80%，先修 rubric 再发布
一个 A/B 测试夹具
questions.explanation: Calibration sets keep the reviewer honest; if agreement drifts you fix the rubric, not the data.
questions.explanation_zh: 校准集让 reviewer 保持诚实；一致率漂移时该修的是 rubric，不是数据。

questions.question: Where does the reviewer's report integrate with the rest of the workbench?
questions.question_zh: Reviewer 的报告如何融入 workbench 其他部分？
options: It bundles into the handoff packet (Lesson 40); human review starts from the report, not from a blank page
It only goes to the manager
options_zh: 它打包进交接包（第 40 课）；人类评审从报告开始，而不是从一张白纸开始
questions.explanation: The review report feeds the handoff so the next session and the human reviewer start from a written verdict.
questions.explanation_zh: 评审报告喂给交接包，下一次会话和人类评审者都从一份成文的判定开始。
